DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT LACH PHAM'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING PLAINTIFF TO ANSWER FORM INTERROGATORIES, RESPOND TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, AND ANSWER SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $490, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Pltf To Answer Form Interrogatories; Respond To Request For Production Of Documents; Answer Special Interrogatories; Reauest For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-10-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Defendant Lach Pham's Motion For Order Compelling Plaintiff To Answer Form Interrogatories, Respond To Request For Production Of Documents, And Answer Special Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $490, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
